description: Example pull request with SQL model, export, and AI workflow changes.

changes.description: Revenue dashboard aggregates active ARR by region and account status.
changes.sql: SELECT region, account_status, SUM(arr) AS arr FROM ACMECLOUD_DEMO.PUBLIC.CUSTOMERS WHERE account_status = 'active' GROUP BY region, account_status

changes.description: Analyst-facing customer detail model includes customer identifiers.
changes.sql: SELECT customer_id, email, arr FROM ACMECLOUD_DEMO.PUBLIC.CUSTOMERS WHERE region = 'EU'

changes.description: Marketing activation model selects names and email addresses.
changes.sql: SELECT customer_name, email FROM ACMECLOUD_DEMO.PUBLIC.CUSTOMERS WHERE account_status = 'active'

changes.description: CRM sync sends approved customer fields to Salesforce.
Fine-tune a support assistant on raw support ticket text.
